testcase.name: test_04_intake_submit_generates_profile_and_roadmap
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:404: in test_04_intake_submit_generates_profile_and_roadmap assert r.status_code == 200, f"intake submit failed: {r.text[:500]}" E AssertionError: intake submit failed: {"detail":"Error IA: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadGatewayError: BadGatewayError: OpenAIException - Error code: 502"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_05_status_after_intake
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:433: in test_05_status_after_intake assert s["has_profile"] is True E assert False is True

testcase.name: test_06_get_profile
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:439: in test_06_get_profile assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_08_today_generates_and_caches
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:456: in test_08_today_generates_and_caches assert r1.status_code == 200, r1.text[:400] E AssertionError: {"detail":"Completa el diagnóstico primero"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:479: in test_09_complete_today assert r.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
